@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(expiry_skew30_boundary)
C: auth_mw∧expiry∧rule(expMs<nowMs=>401)∧allow(skew30_only)∧issue(refresh_loop)
H: exp_lt_no_skew∧skew30_fix
P: expMs+30000<nowMs→401
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(expiry_skew30_boundary).
Constraints: auth middleware and expiry and rule(expMs<nowMs implies 401) and allow(skew30_only) and issue(refresh_loop).
Hypothesis: exp < now without grace window and 30-second grace window fix.
Plan: expMs+30000<nowMs then 401.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.

G: fix(refresh_race_409_loop)
C: refresh_token∧409∧rotation∧reuse(old_refresh_token)∧parallel_refresh_race
H: old_refresh_token mark_pending_once ∧ grace_short ∧ idempotent_winner
P: parallel_use(old_refresh_token)→first=200∧second

G: fix(skew30_fix)
C: webhook_verify_timestamp∧abs(now-ts)>300=>401∧provider_skew_only∧edge_timestamp_rejects_valid_webhook
H: exp_lt_no_skew∧edge(-31s_401)∧edge(-30s_200)
P: skew30_fix

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(exp_ms_sec_mismatch)

H: exp_ms_vs_now_sec
P: normalize_once(exp,now)→bc∧sec∧skew30_fix
V: keep_401∧reg_t∧exp_lt_no
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(exp_ms_sec_mismatch).
Constraints: oauth_cb and exp<now implies 401 and fresh_token_rejected.
Hypothesis: exp_ms_vs_now_sec.
Plan: normalize_once(exp, now) then backward compatibility and security and 30-second grace window fix.
Verify: keep 401 behavior and regression test and exp_lt_no.
Answer target: regression test.

P: now>reset→allow ∧ now=reset→allow_once ∧ now<
